inspiration.title: Atypica AI Research demo
inspiration.insight: Use a shocked face hook, then show the product workflow turning social signals into a decision-ready insight.

subtitle.zh:
我差点花三个月
做一个没人想要的东西
subtitle.en:
I almost spent 3 months
building something nobody wanted

scenes.assetPath: source/室内设计是否有市场：抓取社媒界面.mp4

subtitle.zh:
我把这个市场问题
直接丢进去
subtitle.en:
I dropped the market question
straight in

subtitle.zh:
它不是给我几条评论
而是找重复出现的信号
subtitle.en:
It did not give me random comments
it found repeated signals

subtitle.zh:
结果我发现
用户卡住的点完全不是价格
subtitle.en:
Turns out
price was not the real blocker
